title: phyllanthus micranthus
intro: Phyllanthus micranthus, also known as the small-leaved phyllanthus, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and tannins. The health benefits of Phyllanthus micranthus include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating symptoms of various infections, such as diarrhea and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
